toolbar.dragDropHint: Drag & Drop PNGs here to open
toolbar.noActiveDoc: No active document. Open or create a file first.

editor.pasteError: Cannot Paste: Target area is not fully transparent.
editor.noSpace: Cannot find enough transparent area (space) to place the object.

prompts.unsavedChanges:
"{{title}}" has unsaved changes.
Do you want to download before closing?
prompts.exitWarning: Changes have not been downloaded. Are you sure you want to exit?

mouse.drag: Drag Area: Define tile area (automatically copies on release)
mouse.click: Click Selection: Cut and start move mode
mouse.rightClickObject: Right-Click Object: Auto-pack to empty space
mouse.pan: Wheel Click / Shift + Drag: Screen Panning

shortcuts.copy: Ctrl + C / X / V: Copy, Cut, Paste
shortcuts.undo: Ctrl + Z / Shift+Z (or Ctrl+Y): Undo / Redo
shortcuts.cancel: Esc / Backspace / Delete: Cancel selection or delete object
shortcuts.confirm: Enter / Space: Lock floating object to current position

tips.trim: Auto-trim removes transparency when dragging a selection.
tips.move: Click again inside selection to move it immediately.
tips.bg: Change background color to see transparent pixels clearly.
